title: FDDI – Junior Faculty – 2 Posts
shortInfo: Footwear Design and Development Institute (FDDI) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Junior Faculty. Candidates with Master's Degree Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through FDDI official website.

basic_details.job_title: FDDI Junior Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Footwear Design and Development Institute (FDDI) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Junior Faculty. Candidates with Master's Degree Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through FDDI official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree (min. two years duration after Graduation) in relevant fields with min. 55% marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the FDDI Junior Faculty Recruitment 2026.
